messages.content: rephrase : Successfully proved the supremacy of the new physical synthesis technology over the traditional tools that target only on either functional and timing or physical implementation by winning benchmarks against competors.

Demonstrated the superiority of the new physical synthesis technology, which outperforms conventional tools that focus solely on functional, timing, or physical implementation aspects, by outshining competitors in benchmark comparisons.
rephrase just Demonstrated
Showcased
rephrase: Worked on the design of SH3E (Super Hitachi) family embedded microprocessor in 0.18um technology node.
Participated in the engineering of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors utilizing the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
rephrase just Participated
Contributed to the development of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors within the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
rephrase just contributed
Engaged in the design process of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors at the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
rephrase just engaged
Involved in the creation of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors based on the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
rephrase just involved
Took part in the design and development of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors using the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
I don't like "took part" do you have single word alternative?
Collaborated in the design of the SH3E (Super Hitachi) family of embedded microprocessors in the 0.18-micrometer technology node.
rephrase : Designed and integrated multiple logic blocks including a CPU core, bus controller, PCI interface, and Floating-Point Unit.
Engineered and amalgamated various logic components comprising a CPU core, bus controller, PCI interface, and Floating-Point Unit.
please rephrase again
Crafted and unified several logic modules, such as a CPU core, bus controller, PCI interface, and a Floating-Point Unit.
rephrase : As a recognition of my work performance and potential, sent to Hitachi Semiconductor HQ in Tokyo twice to port the last generation design over to the US design center.

In acknowledgement of my professional achievements and capabilities, I was dispatched twice to Hitachi Semiconductor's headquarters in Tokyo to transfer the knowledge of the latest generation design back to the design center in the United States.
rephrase: Worked alongside architects and logic designers and gave crucial suggestions to construct efficient floorplans for area and power.
Collaborated with architects and logic designers, providing essential recommendations to develop floorplans optimized for area and power efficiency.
rephrase just "worked": Worked alongside architects and logic designers and gave crucial suggestions to construct efficient floorplans for area and power.
Cooperated with architects and logic designers, offering vital input to create effective floorplans that prioritize area and power conservation.
